title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Robert Symons

Executive Vice President, Partnerships and Development

##### Steve Hardy

##### Lehua Stonebraker

Senior Vice President, People

##### Michał Nowak

Senior Vice President, Engineering

##### Shiran Yaroslavsky

Senior Vice President, Product

##### Alison Bosch

Senior Vice President, Operations and Chief of Staff

title: Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Naukri India

Naukri’s integration with TeamTailor simplifies the process of posting open requisitions to seamlessly flow from the external ATS system into Naukri.

Naukri.com is India's No. 1 job posting website and to post jobs & hire candidates across Industries, locations & experience levels Our intelligent sourcing API harnesses the power of AI and machine learning to enhance candidate discovery. By tapping into vast, diverse talent pools and leveraging sophisticated algorithms, it identifies and recommends top-tier candidates who align perfectly with your specific job requirements. This proactive approach ensures that your talent acquisition efforts are both comprehensive and efficient.

title: Workable Data Protection Policies | Privacy, DPA, Sub-Processors
text:
Workable Data Protection Policies | Privacy, DPA, Sub-Processors

# Data Protection

Data Protection

Data Processing Addendum

## Data Processing Addendum

This Data Processing Addendum (“Addendum”) is incorporated into the agreement(s) between the customer (“Customer” or “Controller”) and the Workable entity contracting with the Customer (“Workable” or “Processor”) for the Customer’s use of the Services (“Agreement”).

This Addendum forms part of and is subject to all provisions of the terms available at workable.com/terms (“Terms”), or other agreements between the Controller and Processor governing the Controller’s use of the Services.

The Controller enters this Addendum on behalf of itself and, to the extent required under applicable Data Protection Laws (defined below), in the name and on behalf of its Affiliates (defined below), if authorized by Workable, acting as a Controller. For clarity, Customer’s Affiliates are permitted to use the Services pursuant to the Agreement but have not signed their separate agreement. All access to and use of the Services by the Affiliates must comply with the terms and conditions of this Addendum and any violation of the terms of this Addendum by an Affiliate shall be deemed a violation by the Controller.

If a Customer has signed a Data Processing Agreement with a Workable entity or has negotiated specific data protection terms in their Workable Quote, this separate agreement shall prevail over this Addendum.

#### Definitions

1. "Affiliate" means (i) an entity of which a party directly or indirectly owns fifty percent (50%) or more of the stock or other equity interest, (ii) an entity that owns at least fifty percent (50%) or more of the stock or other equity interest of a party, or (iii) an entity which is under common control with a party by having at least fifty percent (50%) or more of the stock or other equity interest of such entity and a party owned by the same person, but such entity shall only be deemed to be an A

title: Build custom reports using AI ✨ | Teamtailor
text:
Build custom reports using AI ✨ | Teamtailor

May 25, 2026

# Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.

Suzan Dil

Creating custom reports just got a whole lot easier. Instead of clicking through settings to configure a chart, you can now simply describe what you want to see, and Co-pilot takes care of the rest.

#### From idea to chart in seconds

Adding a new chart to your custom report used to mean picking the right data, choosing the chart type, and fine-tuning the settings until it looked right. Now you can skip straight to the result.

#### Make it yours

The chart Co-pilot builds is fully editable, just like any other chart in your custom reports. Tweak the filters, change the type, and move it around your report to get it exactly the way you want.

#### Get started

1. Head over to Analytics and open a Custom historic report.
2. Add a new chart and choose to build it with Co-pilot.
3. Describe the chart you want and see it generate.

This is now available for everyone with Co-pilot enabled, one more way to make data-driven recruitment effortless. You can read more in our support article.

Happy reporting!

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

### Latest integrations: Powering up your recruitment workflow (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)

- May 28, 2026Every Teamtailor career site works seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.
- Apr 9, 2026We are thrilled to announce new and powerful integrations that have gone live from December to March!

title: How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor
text:
How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor

Feb 26, 2026

# How Knauf Transformed its Global Recruitment for 43,000 Employees

Bridging tradition and technology: The Global Recruitment team is bringing Knauf’s 90-year history into the digital age

Discover how James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at Knauf, steered a two-year digital transformation to unify recruitment for 43,500 employees, ultimately driving a 50% increase in applicant volume while bridging the gap between a 90-year legacy and modern talent acquisition.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

Maria Bohrer

Sales Team Manager DACH

Knauf is a global leader in the building materials industry - a 90-year-old, family-owned powerhouse. But as their factories became "smarter" and their sales processes went digital, their recruitment process faced a challenge: it was stuck in a decentralized, manual past.

We spoke with James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at the Knauf Group People Team, about how he navigated this complex transformation. His goal? To move from a fragmented "black box" of local processes to a unified, "best-in-class" global engine.

## Why Change was needed

Question: How would you describe Knauf’s recruitment philosophy? In an industry as established as yours, how do you balance "tradition" with the need for modern talent acquisition?

James Forster: "Our recruitment philosophy centres on two pillars: we deliver a best-in-class candidate experience—clear, timely communication; transparency, fair, inclusive evaluation; and respectful closure for every applicant. We also equip our people with a robust, data-enabled hiring system that empowers both candidates and colleagues to identify, assess, and secure best-in-class talent, consistently and at scale. Historically one of the last to embrace digitalisation, our sector is now moving quickly. We seek people who are technologically fluent but also thrive within a family-owned, values-led environment. Our process

title: Tellent Whitepaper: Security, Compliance & Operations
text:
Tellent Whitepaper

Security, Compliance & Operations

With this document, Tellent provides you transparency and clarity on its security, compliance and operations policies that form the foundations of our business and partnerships. Because we know that engaging a service provider is an important business decision and that, like any partnership, it should be built on trust.

In this document, you can expect a general overview of the security measures taken by 
Tellent as an organization and in the Tellent Software as a Service products/modules: 
● KiwiHR by Tellent, a core human resources system 
● Javelo by Tellent, a performance management system 
● Recruitee by Tellent, an applicant tracking system 
● Any other service that provides unified functionality between the above-mentioned 
products/modules. 

For questions, please contact the Tellent via the in-app support chat, or the Security Team directly via: security@tellent.com

Table of Contents 
Compliance 3 
ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 assurance report 3 
Internal auditing and penetration tests 3 
GDPR 3 
Customer data (including customer personal data) 3 
Application Security 4 
Identity and Role based access 4 
Security of data in transit and encryption 4 
Secure coding 5 
Malware and cross-site-scripting protection 5 
Authentication 5 
E-mail protection 5 
Hosting, technical and physical infrastructure 6 
Protection of Servers and Infrastructure 6 
Multi-tenancy 6 
Logging and Monitoring 6 
Disaster Recovery, Backup, and Redundancy 7 
Hosting providers & data centers 7 
Offices 7 
Organization and Management, Security Policies and Processes 8 
Incident Response 8 
Service level and support 8 
Definitions 8 
Last updated: 14th of November 2024 2 

Compliance, Certifications, and Audit reports

ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 assurance report 
Tellent: 
- ISO 27001:2022 
- A copy of Tellent’s ISO 27001 certification can be found here. 
- Tellent’s ISO 27001 statement of applicability can be found here.

Naukri’s integration with TeamTailor simplifies the process of posting open requisitions to seamlessly flow from the external ATS system into Naukri.

Naukri.com is India's No. 1 job posting website and to post jobs & hire candidates across Industries, locations & experience levels Our intelligent sourcing API harnesses the power of AI and machine learning to enhance candidate discovery. By tapping into vast, diverse talent pools and leveraging sophisticated algorithms, it identifies and recommends top-tier candidates who align perfectly with your specific job requirements. This proactive approach ensures that your talent acquisition efforts are both comprehensive and efficient.
highlights:
Naukri India | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Optimiere dein Recruiting mit unseren Integrationen

## Naukri India

Naukri’s integration with TeamTailor simplifies the process of posting open requisitions to seamlessly flow from the external ATS system into Naukri.

Naukri.com is India's No. 1 job posting website and to post jobs & hire candidates across Industries, locations & experience levels Our intelligent sourcing API harnesses the power of AI and machine learning to enhance candidate discovery. By tapping into vast, diverse talent pools and leveraging sophisticated algorithms, it identifies and recommends top-tier candidates who align perfectly with your specific job requirements. This proactive approach ensures that your talent acquisition efforts are both comprehensive and efficient.

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.
